name: getFileSearch
description:
Search for text across all readable files in a directory tree and return matching files with short snippets. Use this when the player mentions a person, place, or landmark and you need to find the relevant module file before opening it with getFileContent.

Typical D&D use:
- Search dm-notebook/module for a phrase like 'Baba Lysaga', 'winery', 'amber temple', or 'we go to the old mill'
- Inspect the matching file paths and snippets
- Open the most relevant file with getFileContent and update dm-notebook/status/current.md if needed

directory.description: Relative directory path to search, e.g. 'dm-notebook/module'.

query.description: Plain text search query to look for inside files.

contextChars.description: Approximate number of surrounding characters to include in each snippet. Default 220.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matches to return. Default 12.
